ai_game_master: Two squads of 11 generational talents plus a sub trio each. Every pick has a target tuned to their real-world role — keepers need clean sheets, defenders need tackles, creators need assists, finishers need goals. Twenty-eight passes, one survival ladder.

players.name: Thibaut Courtois

target.human: Make 4+ saves OR keep a clean sheet

players.ai_rationale: Phoenix XI's wall. Standard-issue elite-keeper target — anything less and you're not earning the pass.

players.name: Achraf Hakimi
players.ai_rationale: Hybrid full-back — needs to defend AND chip in. Either branch reads as a successful Hakimi match.

players.name: Virgil van Dijk
players.ai_rationale: Anchor of the back line. Six tackles+clearances is a routine night for peak Virgil.

players.name: Ruben Dias
players.ai_rationale: Reads the game first, tackles second. Pairing accuracy with clearances captures both halves of his job.

players.name: Rodri
players.ai_rationale: The Ballon d'Or holding mid. Five defensive actions reflects the floor of his game.

players.name: Kevin De Bruyne
players.ai_rationale: Either touches the ball decisively or doesn't. Single contribution clears the bar.

players.name: Jude Bellingham
players.ai_rationale: Box-crashing midfielder. Bellingham scoring or assisting is the median outcome, not the upside.

players.name: Bukayo Saka
players.ai_rationale: Cuts inside and decides games. Anything less than a goal or assist and Phoenix probably lost this wing.

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.ai_rationale: Brutal target. Anything less than a brace and you bought the Haaland pass for the wrong reasons.

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.ai_rationale: The marquee pick. Brutal multi-contribution target — superstars get superstar bars.

players.name: Vinicius Junior
players.ai_rationale: Direct dribbler in his prime. One goal contribution captures a typical effective Vinicius.

players.name: Ederson
players.ai_rationale: Sweeper-keeper. Combo target reflects both halves: distribution then shot-stopping.

players.name: Alphonso Davies
players.ai_rationale: Galloping wingback. Either side of the field shows up — defense or attack.

players.name: Antonio Rüdiger
players.ai_rationale: Aggressive, front-foot defender. Six combined actions is a baseline.

players.name: Marquinhos
players.ai_rationale: Composed reader of the game. Distribution-plus-clearances mirrors his actual job.

players.name: Bernardo Silva
players.ai_rationale: Pulls strings without flashy stats. Three key passes captures his quiet brilliance.

players.name: Pedri
players.ai_rationale: Metronome midfielder. Combo target reflects both retention and creativity.

players.name: Jamal Musiala
players.ai_rationale: Glides through midfield. Single goal contribution is a routine Musiala match.

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.ai_rationale: Generational winger. Even at 18, anything less than a contribution is a flat night.

players.name: Lautaro Martínez
players.ai_rationale: Clinical 9. One goal is the floor for a striker of his quality.

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.ai_rationale: Twilight Messi still bends games. Two contributions remains a vintage Messi line.

players.name: Cristiano Ronaldo
players.ai_rationale: Brutal late-career target. Either he plants two or you eat the pass.

players.name: Florian Wirtz
players.ai_rationale: Phoenix XI sub. Creative spark — one direct contribution is the baseline expectation.

players.name: Nico Williams
players.ai_rationale: Phoenix XI sub. Pace-and-dribble winger — finishes or sets up at least once.

players.name: Federico Valverde
players.ai_rationale: Phoenix XI sub. Box-to-box engine — combined defensive + creative output captures his game.

players.name: Bruno Fernandes
players.ai_rationale: Eclipse XI sub. Set-piece + chance creation specialist — a single contribution is the floor.

players.name: Phil Foden
players.ai_rationale: Eclipse XI sub. Reigning POTY pedigree — anything less than a goal contribution underwhelms.

players.name: Declan Rice
players.ai_rationale: Eclipse XI sub. Anchor enforcer — 5 defensive actions reads as a clean Rice match.
